title: Document deterministic reference datasets and evaluation-selection workflow in the public web app
description:
## Summary
Document the deterministic reference dataset, curation, value-function, and evaluation-selection features in the public-facing documentation pages of the web app.

## Deliverables
- Add end-user/operator documentation for deterministic reference datasets, including what they are, how they are assigned to a score, and why they are used.
- Document curation inputs, label provenance concepts, and the deterministic label-resolution policy at the product level.
- Document how deterministic reference datasets fit into evaluation runs, regression testing, value-function comparisons, and optimization acceptance decisions.
- Ensure the documentation lives in the public-facing documentation section of the dashboard/web app rather than only in code comments or internal notes.

## Notes
This task should land with the feature work so new capabilities ship with usable public documentation.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting docs implementation for deterministic reference datasets + evaluation-selection workflow, including dataset build flags and reference-dataset evaluation usage.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Moved to blocked due to unresolved dependencies (plx-7fcaff, plx-21138f).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Implemented public docs for deterministic reference dataset workflow.

New documentation page:
- /documentation/concepts/reference-datasets
- file: dashboard/app/documentation/concepts/reference-datasets/page.tsx

Navigation updates:
- Added sidebar entry under Concepts: Reference Datasets
  - file: dashboard/app/documentation/components/documentation-layout.tsx
- Added Concepts landing card linking to Reference Datasets
  - file: dashboard/app/documentation/concepts/page.tsx

Method guide update:
- Added deterministic build + evaluate CLI workflow section to Evaluate a Score docs
  - file: dashboard/app/documentation/methods/evaluate-score/page.tsx

Documented operator commands include:
- dataset load with --reference-frozen / --reference-role / --assign-reference-pointer / --deterministic-order
- evaluate accuracy with --reference-dataset-role

This publishes the new deterministic features in the public-facing dashboard documentation.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Checkpoint update:
- Public docs page added for deterministic reference datasets:
  dashboard/app/documentation/concepts/reference-datasets/page.tsx
- Docs navigation and concepts landing updated to expose the new page.
- Evaluate Score docs updated with deterministic build/evaluate workflow and reference-dataset flags.

Validation run completed:
- pytest -q plexus/cli/evaluation/evaluations_reference_dataset_test.py (3 passed)
- pytest -q plexus/cli/shared/evaluation_value_function_test.py (4 passed)
- pytest -q plexus/cli/shared/optimization_acceptance_policy_test.py (4 passed)
- pytest -q plexus/data/test_feedback_items.py -k "reference_label_resolution or skips_unresolved or create_dataset_rows_with_data" (4 passed)
- pytest -q plexus/cli/dataset/datasets_test.py -k "load_command_success or builtin_reference_cache_class_resolution or load_command_applies_item_pipeline_to_text" (3 passed)

Task status remains in_progress until final commit/merge.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Closing: public docs now reflect associated-dataset workflow, including score dataset-curate command and associated-dataset evaluation flow in concepts and evaluate-score docs.
